title: Urgent Opening Teacher at American Institute Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at American Institute Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at American Institute Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About American Institute Global Group:
American Institute Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute Global Group!
